title: Warm Flaky Turkish Pickle Borek
description: A lacto-vegetarian Turkish dish featuring pickles and marinate, perfect for a sick day, this warm flaky borek is a comforting treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped pickles, crumbly feta cheese, chopped onion, and chopped parsley.
In a separate bowl, mix the melted butter, beaten egg, salt, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix well.
Unroll the phyllo dough and cut it into 4 equal pieces.
Place a quarter of the pickle mixture onto the center of each phyllo piece.
Brush the edges of the phyllo with the remaining melted butter.
Fold the phyllo into a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the borek with the remaining egg mixture.
Place the borek on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes.
